name: changelock-shift-left
description: Run ChangeLock preflight diagnostics inside VS Code using changelock-cli.

changelock.apiUrl.description: Optional ChangeLock API URL for API-assisted context.

changelock.token.description: Optional read-only ChangeLock API bearer token. Prefer tokenEnvVar in shared workspaces.

changelock.tokenEnvVar.description: Environment variable to read when no inline token is configured.

changelock.offline.description: Disable API-assisted checks and run local-only preflight diagnostics.

changelock.policyDir.description: Path to the Kyverno policy directory, relative to the workspace root unless absolute.

changelock.bundleDir.description: Path to the ChangeLock bundle directory, relative to the workspace root unless absolute.

changelock.scanner.description: Scanner preference when preflight extracts a digest-pinned image from the current manifest.

changelock.tenant.description: Tenant used for API-assisted context and local bundle evaluation.

changelock.repository.description: Optional repository identity override, for example my-org/acme-app.

changelock.runOnSave.description: Run current-file ChangeLock checks automatically after saving YAML manifests.
